entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 11:2
entries.excerpt: "Where there is pride," etc. Because they behave arrogantly and insultingly, through contempt or ignorance of discipline, they insult their neighbors; or certainly because everyone who exalts himself will be humbled (Luke XIV, XVIII).

entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 11:2
entries.excerpt: "But where there is humility," etc. "You have hidden these things from the wise and prudent, and revealed them to little children" (Matt. XI; Luke X), that is, to the humble.
